$description: iOS 26 Liquid Glass overrides. Omnibar lives in a floating pill above content; haptics on selection are first-class.

contextMenu.$description: iOS native context menu (UIContextMenuConfiguration) — we do not override the material, only the accent tint used in highlight.

haptics.$description: iOS haptic engine. Mapped from semantic haptic tokens.

dynamicType.$description: Generator emits UIFont.preferredFont(forTextStyle:) for themeable type sizes.

shape.$description: iOS 26 prefers more generous radii for the floating omnibar.
